message:
feat(dashboard): extract FocusRing abstraction and bubbles/list pane delegate

Introduce two new dashboard subsystems that replace manual index
arithmetic with proper abstractions:

FocusRing (internal/tui/dashboard/focus.go):
- Circular focus tracker with Next(), Prev(), SetByID(), Rebuild()
- Skips hidden targets automatically during traversal
- Preserves focus across layout rebuilds (falls back to first visible
  target if the previously focused panel was removed)

Tests (focus_test.go): next/prev wrapping, skip hidden, SetByID,
rebuild preserves focus, rebuild with removed target, empty ring,
key message dispatch.

Pane list delegate (dashboard_layout_test.go):
- 242 new lines testing the bubbles/list integration:
  TestPaneItemInterface, TestPaneDelegateRender,
  TestPaneListRefreshPreservesSelection, TestPaneListEmptyState,
  TestPaneListFilterKey, TestToPaneItems, BenchmarkPaneListView

The dashboard's cycleFocus() is rewritten to use FocusRing. panelIDStr
local closure extracted to panelIDString top-level function shared by
both tab bar and focus ring. Mouse click now calls
setFocusedPanel(PanelPaneList).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
